warnings: This building cross-section (รูปตัด 2) cuts through จอดรถ, ห้องนอน3, ห้องน้ำ, and ห้องนอน1 along the gridA-to-gridF direction, showing the roof monopitch in full profile with 'SLOPE 6' visible near the ridge and both eave details (R1 at the low/carport end, R2 at the high/gridF end) cross-referenced to A-16.
